projects.title: MarketSpider
projects.description: Bot de scraping avancé permettant d'être notifié instantanément de bonnes affaires se trouvant sur des sites de vente en ligne tel que Vinted ou Leboncoin
projects.image_alt: Rendu 3D d'un télephone contenant l'interface de MarketSpider

detail.subtitle: 01 / BTS-SIO / DevOps
detail.challenge: Building a fully automated deployment pipeline that could handle high-availability requirements across multiple cloud providers while maintaining strict consistency guarantees.
detail.challenge2: The existing infrastructure relied on manual deployment scripts. The goal was to transition to a fully declarative infrastructure-as-code approach using Terraform combined with Docker containerization.
detail.feature1_desc: Automated synchronization across AWS regions using Terraform state management.
detail.feature2_desc: Custom internal commands for rapid environment staging.
detail.feature3_desc: Fine-grained role-based access control across all cloud resources.
detail.detail_image_alt: High-end minimalist workstation with multiple monitors displaying architectural diagrams
detail.code_block:
for filtre in Filtres: 
    #scrap the page
    scraper.scrap(filtre['url'])
    #parse the page
    scraper.Parse(filtre['plateforme'])
    #append the listings to the queue for parallel processing
    scraper.Append_to_Queue(condition=filtre['condition'], platform=filtre['plateforme'])
detail.detail_image2_alt: Extreme close-up of a high-resolution retina display showing crisp typography in a dark mode UI.
detail.detail_note: Focus on operational simplicity was paramount: every component is fully declarative, reproducible, and auditable by the entire team through version-controlled infrastructure code.

projects.title: Inventory Engine v2
projects.description: A robust inventory management system built with transactional integrity in mind. Handles concurrent requests for multi-warehouse logistics.
projects.image_alt: overhead view of high-quality mechanical keyboard and clean desk setup with monitors showing code blocks

detail.subtitle: 02 / BTS-SIO / Software Engineering
detail.challenge: In the context of the BTS SIO program, the primary challenge was creating a scalable database abstraction layer capable of handling 5,000+ concurrent inventory requests without bottlenecking the main application thread.
detail.challenge2: The legacy system used a single monolithic data store with no concurrency controls. The migration required implementing optimistic locking, database partitioning, and a domain-driven design to ensure strict ACID compliance.
detail.feature1_desc: Centralized logical model managing stock across distributed physical locations.
detail.feature2_desc: Fully documented Spring Boot REST API with HATEOAS compliance.
detail.feature3_desc: Version-based concurrency control preventing inventory race conditions.
detail.detail_image_alt: High-end minimalist workstation with multiple monitors displaying architectural diagrams
detail.detail_image2_alt: Close-up of a modern display showing clean typography in a dark mode UI dashboard.
detail.detail_note: The system was designed with extensibility first: adding a new warehouse requires only a configuration entry, with zero code changes required to the core logic layer.

projects.title: Nexus Analytics Platform
projects.description: Real-time data visualization dashboard designed for network monitoring. Focus on performance and accessible UI components.
projects.image_alt: abstract geometric composition with sharp lines and blue glass textures representing architectural complexity

detail.subtitle: 03 / BTS-SIO / Web Development
detail.challenge: Designing a high-performance analytics dashboard capable of rendering thousands of real-time data points simultaneously while remaining accessible and responsive across all device types.
detail.challenge2: Standard charting libraries were insufficient for the scale and interactivity required. D3.js was chosen for its low-level control, combined with Next.js server components to handle data fetching at the edge.
detail.feature1_desc: D3.js powered visualizations with WebSocket live data feeds.
detail.feature2_desc: Next.js server components for ultra-fast initial page loads.
detail.feature3_desc: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant components with full keyboard navigation.
detail.detail_image_alt: High-end minimalist workstation with multiple monitors displaying architectural diagrams
detail.detail_image2_alt: Close-up of a modern display showing rich data visualizations.
detail.detail_note: The dashboard was designed to be data-source agnostic. Swapping from a REST API to a WebSocket stream requires only a configuration change, keeping the visualization layer fully decoupled.

projects.title: SecureGate Firewall
projects.description: Custom security layer implementation for private network clusters. Automated intrusion detection and IP blacklisting script suite.
projects.image_alt: clean macro shot of computer circuitry and glowing blue led lights in a dark server room environment

detail.subtitle: 04 / BTS-SIO / Security
detail.challenge: Designing a lightweight, autonomous intrusion detection system for private network clusters without relying on expensive third-party security appliances.
detail.challenge2: The existing network had no automated threat response. The solution parses kernel logs in real-time, scores suspicious patterns using a custom heuristic algorithm, and automatically applies iptables rules to block offending IPs.
detail.feature1_desc: Real-time kernel log analysis with heuristic threat scoring.
detail.feature2_desc: Automated iptables rule injection for detected threat IPs.
detail.feature3_desc: Webhook-based alerts to Slack and email on high-severity events.
detail.detail_image_alt: Server room with blue ambient lighting and dense cable management.
detail.code_block:
async def analyze_entry(log_line: str):
    score = heuristic_score(log_line)

    if score >= THREAT_THRESHOLD:
        ip = extract_ip(log_line)
        await blacklist_ip(ip)
        await send_alert(
            severity='HIGH',
            ip=ip,
            score=score
        )
detail.detail_image2_alt: Circuit board close-up with glowing indicators representing active monitoring.
detail.detail_note: The entire system runs as a systemd service with automatic restart on failure, ensuring continuous protection without manual intervention even during system reboots.
